signal: NONE — source changed but there is no spec.md/AC/FR-mapping delta, so no behavior-change signal fires (R2). The cross-layer gate keys off the behavior-change signal, not arbitrary source-file inference.
expected_reason: A pure refactor produces no behavior-change signal, so the cross-layer gate does NOT fire and does NOT force a meaningless test-file touch. This is the critical 'must NOT block' green case.
lexically_clean_note: head/orders.py is kept free of requirement-ish tokens (spec / AC / FR / behavior) in its CHANGED text on purpose, so a naive keyword prefilter cannot mistake this refactor for a behavior change. The trigger must be a real spec/FR-mapping delta, not source-text keywords.
